_source: Hanuman Chalisa by Goswami Tulsidas (16th c., Awadhi) — public domain. The traditional, universally-recited text: 2 opening dohas, 40 chaupais, 1 closing doha. Devanagari + IAST-style transliteration + plain-English meaning.
title: Hanuman Chalisa

lines.devanagari:
श्रीगुरु चरन सरोज रज, निज मनु मुकुरु सुधारि।
बरनउँ रघुबर बिमल जसु, जो दायकु फल चारि॥
lines.transliteration:
śrīguru charana saroja raja, nija manu mukuru sudhāri.
baranau raghubara bimala jasu, jo dāyaku phala chāri.
lines.meaning: Cleansing the mirror of my mind with the dust of my Guru's lotus feet, I describe the pure glory of Lord Rama, who bestows the four fruits of life.

lines.devanagari:
बुद्धिहीन तनु जानिके, सुमिरौं पवन-कुमार।
बल बुधि बिद्या देहु मोहिं, हरहु कलेस बिकार॥
lines.transliteration:
buddhihīna tanu jānike, sumirau pavana-kumāra.
bala budhi bidyā dehu mohi, harahu kalesa bikāra.
lines.meaning: Knowing myself to be without wisdom, I remember you, O Son of the Wind. Grant me strength, intellect and knowledge, and remove my afflictions and impurities.

lines.devanagari:
जय हनुमान ज्ञान गुन सागर।
जय कपीस तिहुँ लोक उजागर॥
lines.transliteration:
jaya hanumāna jñāna guna sāgara,
jaya kapīsa tihu loka ujāgara.
lines.meaning: Victory to Hanuman, ocean of wisdom and virtue. Victory to the Lord of monkeys who illumines the three worlds.

lines.devanagari:
राम दूत अतुलित बल धामा।
अंजनि-पुत्र पवनसुत नामा॥
lines.transliteration:
rāma dūta atulita bala dhāmā,
anjani-putra pavanasuta nāmā.
lines.meaning: You are Rama's messenger, the abode of incomparable strength, known as the son of Anjani and the Wind.

lines.devanagari:
महाबीर बिक्रम बजरंगी।
कुमति निवार सुमति के संगी॥
lines.transliteration:
mahābīra bikrama bajarangī,
kumati nivāra sumati ke sangī.
lines.meaning: Great hero, mighty as a thunderbolt, you dispel evil thoughts and are the companion of good sense.

lines.devanagari:
कंचन बरन बिराज सुबेसा।
कानन कुंडल कुंचित केसा॥
lines.transliteration:
kanchana barana birāja subesā,
kānana kundala kunchita kesā.
lines.meaning: Golden-hued and splendidly attired, with rings in your ears and curly hair.

lines.devanagari:
हाथ बज्र औ ध्वजा बिराजै।
काँधे मूँज जनेऊ साजै॥
lines.transliteration:
hātha bajra au dhvajā birājai,
kādhe mūja janeū sājai.
lines.meaning: In your hands shine the mace and banner; a sacred thread of munja grass adorns your shoulder.

lines.devanagari:
शंकर सुवन केसरी नंदन।
तेज प्रताप महा जग बंदन॥
lines.transliteration:
shankara suvana kesarī nandana,
teja pratāpa mahā jaga bandana.
lines.meaning: Incarnation of Shiva and delight of Kesari, your splendour and might are revered by the whole world.

lines.devanagari:
विद्यावान गुनी अति चातुर।
राम काज करिबे को आतुर॥
lines.transliteration:
vidyāvāna gunī ati chātura,
rāma kāja karibe ko ātura.
lines.meaning: Learned, virtuous and exceedingly clever, you are ever eager to do Rama's work.

lines.devanagari:
प्रभु चरित्र सुनिबे को रसिया।
राम लखन सीता मन बसिया॥
lines.transliteration:
prabhu charitra sunibe ko rasiyā,
rāma lakhana sītā mana basiyā.
lines.meaning: You delight in hearing the Lord's deeds; Rama, Lakshmana and Sita dwell in your heart.

lines.devanagari:
सूक्ष्म रूप धरि सियहिं दिखावा।
बिकट रूप धरि लंक जरावा॥
lines.transliteration:
sūkshma rūpa dhari siyahi dikhāvā,
bikata rūpa dhari lanka jarāvā.
lines.meaning: Taking a tiny form you appeared to Sita; taking a fearsome form you burned Lanka.

lines.devanagari:
भीम रूप धरि असुर सँहारे।
रामचंद्र के काज सँवारे॥
lines.transliteration:
bhīma rūpa dhari asura sahāre,
rāmachandra ke kāja savāre.
lines.meaning: Assuming a mighty form you slew the demons and accomplished Lord Rama's tasks.

lines.devanagari:
लाय सजीवन लखन जियाये।
श्रीरघुबीर हरषि उर लाये॥
lines.transliteration:
lāya sajīvana lakhana jiyāye,
śrīraghubīra harashi ura lāye.
lines.meaning: You brought the Sanjivani herb and revived Lakshmana; Rama joyfully embraced you to his heart.

lines.devanagari:
रघुपति कीन्ही बहुत बड़ाई।
तुम मम प्रिय भरतहि सम भाई॥
lines.transliteration:
raghupati kīnhī bahuta baṛāī,
tuma mama priya bharatahi sama bhāī.
lines.meaning: Rama praised you greatly: "You are as dear to me as my brother Bharata."

lines.devanagari:
सहस बदन तुम्हरो जस गावैं।
अस कहि श्रीपति कंठ लगावैं॥
lines.transliteration:
sahasa badana tumharo jasa gāvai,
asa kahi śrīpati kantha lagāvai.
lines.meaning: "A thousand mouths shall sing your glory" — so saying, the Lord embraced you.

lines.devanagari:
सनकादिक ब्रह्मादि मुनीसा।
नारद सारद सहित अहीसा॥
lines.transliteration:
sanakādika brahmādi munīsā,
nārada sārada sahita ahīsā.
lines.meaning: Sanaka and the sages, Brahma and the great seers, Narada, Saraswati and Sheshnaga—

lines.devanagari:
जम कुबेर दिगपाल जहाँ ते।
कबि कोबिद कहि सके कहाँ ते॥
lines.transliteration:
jama kubera digapāla jahā te,
kabi kobida kahi sake kahā te.
lines.meaning: Yama, Kubera and the guardians of the directions, poets and scholars—none can fully tell your glory.

lines.devanagari:
तुम उपकार सुग्रीवहिं कीन्हा।
राम मिलाय राज पद दीन्हा॥
lines.transliteration:
tuma upakāra sugrīvahi kīnhā,
rāma milāya rāja pada dīnhā.
lines.meaning: You did Sugriva a great service, uniting him with Rama and restoring his kingdom.

lines.devanagari:
तुम्हरो मंत्र बिभीषन माना।
लंकेश्वर भए सब जग जाना॥
lines.transliteration:
tumharo mantra bibhīshana mānā,
lankeśvara bhae saba jaga jānā.
lines.meaning: Vibhishana heeded your counsel and became king of Lanka, as all the world knows.

lines.devanagari:
जुग सहस्र जोजन पर भानू।
लील्यो ताहि मधुर फल जानू॥
lines.transliteration:
juga sahasra jojana para bhānū,
līlyo tāhi madhura phala jānū.
lines.meaning: The sun, thousands of yojanas away, you swallowed thinking it a sweet fruit.

lines.devanagari:
प्रभु मुद्रिका मेलि मुख माहीं।
जलधि लाँघि गये अचरज नाहीं॥
lines.transliteration:
prabhu mudrikā meli mukha māhī,
jaladhi lāghi gaye acharaja nāhī.
lines.meaning: Carrying the Lord's ring in your mouth, you leapt across the ocean—no wonder in that.

lines.devanagari:
दुर्गम काज जगत के जेते।
सुगम अनुग्रह तुम्हरे तेते॥
lines.transliteration:
durgama kāja jagata ke jete,
sugama anugraha tumhare tete.
lines.meaning: Every difficult task in the world is made easy by your grace.

lines.devanagari:
राम दुआरे तुम रखवारे।
होत न आज्ञा बिनु पैसारे॥
lines.transliteration:
rāma duāre tuma rakhavāre,
hota na ājñā binu paisāre.
lines.meaning: You guard the door of Rama; none may enter without your leave.

lines.devanagari:
सब सुख लहै तुम्हारी सरना।
तुम रक्षक काहू को डर ना॥
lines.transliteration:
saba sukha lahai tumhārī saranā,
tuma rakshaka kāhū ko dara nā.
lines.meaning: All happiness is found in your refuge; with you as protector there is nothing to fear.

lines.devanagari:
आपन तेज सम्हारो आपै।
तीनों लोक हाँक तें काँपै॥
lines.transliteration:
āpana teja samhāro āpai,
tīno loka hāka te kāpai.
lines.meaning: You alone can hold your own splendour; at your roar the three worlds tremble.

lines.devanagari:
भूत पिसाच निकट नहिं आवै।
महाबीर जब नाम सुनावै॥
lines.transliteration:
bhūta pisācha nikata nahi āvai,
mahābīra jaba nāma sunāvai.
lines.meaning: Ghosts and evil spirits dare not come near when the name of the Mighty One is uttered.

lines.devanagari:
नासै रोग हरै सब पीरा।
जपत निरंतर हनुमत बीरा॥
lines.transliteration:
nāsai roga harai saba pīrā,
japata nirantara hanumata bīrā.
lines.meaning: Disease is destroyed and all pain removed by constantly repeating the name of brave Hanuman.

lines.devanagari:
संकट तें हनुमान छुड़ावै।
मन क्रम बचन ध्यान जो लावै॥
lines.transliteration:
sankata te hanumāna chhuṛāvai,
mana krama bachana dhyāna jo lāvai.
lines.meaning: Hanuman frees from distress all who remember him in thought, deed and word.

lines.devanagari:
सब पर राम तपस्वी राजा।
तिन के काज सकल तुम साजा॥
lines.transliteration:
saba para rāma tapasvī rājā,
tina ke kāja sakala tuma sājā.
lines.meaning: Rama, the ascetic king, reigns over all; and you accomplish all his works.

lines.devanagari:
और मनोरथ जो कोई लावै।
सोइ अमित जीवन फल पावै॥
lines.transliteration:
aura manoratha jo koī lāvai,
soi amita jīvana phala pāvai.
lines.meaning: Whoever brings any heartfelt wish to you obtains the boundless fruit of life.

lines.devanagari:
चारों जुग परताप तुम्हारा।
है परसिद्ध जगत उजियारा॥
lines.transliteration:
chāro juga paratāpa tumhārā,
hai parasiddha jagata ujiyārā.
lines.meaning: Your glory shines through all four ages; your renown illumines the world.

lines.devanagari:
साधु संत के तुम रखवारे।
असुर निकंदन राम दुलारे॥
lines.transliteration:
sādhu santa ke tuma rakhavāre,
asura nikandana rāma dulāre.
lines.meaning: You protect the saints and sages, destroy the demons, and are dear to Rama.

lines.devanagari:
अष्ट सिद्धि नौ निधि के दाता।
अस बर दीन जानकी माता॥
lines.transliteration:
ashta siddhi nau nidhi ke dātā,
asa bara dīna jānakī mātā.
lines.meaning: You can grant the eight powers and nine treasures—a boon given to you by Mother Janaki (Sita).

lines.devanagari:
राम रसायन तुम्हरे पासा।
सदा रहो रघुपति के दासा॥
lines.transliteration:
rāma rasāyana tumhare pāsā,
sadā raho raghupati ke dāsā.
lines.meaning: You hold the elixir of devotion to Rama; may you ever remain his servant.

lines.devanagari:
तुम्हरे भजन राम को पावै।
जनम जनम के दुख बिसरावै॥
lines.transliteration:
tumhare bhajana rāma ko pāvai,
janama janama ke dukha bisarāvai.
lines.meaning: Through devotion to you one attains Rama and forgets the sorrows of countless births.

lines.devanagari:
अंत काल रघुबर पुर जाई।
जहाँ जन्म हरि-भक्त कहाई॥
lines.transliteration:
anta kāla raghubara pura jāī,
jahā janma hari-bhakta kahāī.
lines.meaning: At life's end one reaches Rama's abode and is thereafter known as a devotee of Hari.

lines.devanagari:
और देवता चित्त न धरई।
हनुमत सेइ सर्ब सुख करई॥
lines.transliteration:
aura devatā chitta na dharaī,
hanumata sei sarba sukha karaī.
lines.meaning: Even holding no other god in mind, serving Hanuman brings every happiness.

lines.devanagari:
संकट कटै मिटै सब पीरा।
जो सुमिरै हनुमत बलबीरा॥
lines.transliteration:
sankata katai mitai saba pīrā,
jo sumirai hanumata balabīrā.
lines.meaning: All distress is cut away and every pain ends for one who remembers the mighty, brave Hanuman.

lines.devanagari:
जय जय जय हनुमान गोसाईं।
कृपा करहु गुरुदेव की नाईं॥
lines.transliteration:
jaya jaya jaya hanumāna gosāī,
kṛpā karahu gurudeva kī nāī.
lines.meaning: Victory, victory, victory to Lord Hanuman! Bestow your grace upon me as my Guru does.

lines.devanagari:
जो सत बार पाठ कर कोई।
छूटहि बंदि महा सुख होई॥
lines.transliteration:
jo sata bāra pātha kara koī,
chhūtahi bandi mahā sukha hoī.
lines.meaning: Whoever recites this a hundred times is freed from bondage and gains great bliss.

lines.devanagari:
जो यह पढ़ै हनुमान चालीसा।
होय सिद्धि साखी गौरीसा॥
lines.transliteration:
jo yaha paṛai hanumāna chālīsā,
hoya siddhi sākhī gaurīsā.
lines.meaning: Whoever reads this Hanuman Chalisa attains perfection—Shiva, the Lord of Gauri, is witness.

lines.devanagari:
तुलसीदास सदा हरि चेरा।
कीजै नाथ हृदय महँ डेरा॥
lines.transliteration:
tulasīdāsa sadā hari cherā,
kījai nātha hṛdaya maha ḍerā.
lines.meaning: Says Tulsidas, ever the servant of Hari: O Lord, make your dwelling in my heart.

lines.devanagari:
पवनतनय संकट हरन, मंगल मूरति रूप।
राम लखन सीता सहित, हृदय बसहु सुर भूप॥
lines.transliteration:
pavanatanaya sankata harana, mangala mūrati rūpa.
rāma lakhana sītā sahita, hṛdaya basahu sura bhūpa.
lines.meaning: O Son of the Wind, remover of distress, embodiment of all that is auspicious! Together with Rama, Lakshmana and Sita, dwell in my heart, O King of the gods.
